rationale: The e06c0b76..2809c8a6 delta is confined to round-1 fixups and does not weaken the security/escaping contract I approved. Bead 3 still requires hostile config-controlled strings to be escaped in both text paths, pins byte-exact JSON round-trip through a real encoding/json decode, and explicitly forbids string-concatenation JSON by requiring typed structs marshaled with encoding/json. The protocol proof change from grep to jq is security-positive: it aligns with compact encoding/json output instead of encouraging brittle textual assumptions. No new regression appears in escaping, JSON construction, or advisory-output handling.
